rooms.title: Splunk: Basic & Tutorial
rooms.description: Learned SPL searching logic, data ingestion configurations, and dashboard creation for monitoring.

rooms.title: Introduction to SIEM
rooms.description: Studied logs correlation, rules generation, security monitoring flows, and alerting pipelines.

rooms.title: Wazuh EDR/SIEM
rooms.description: Configured Wazuh agents, managed decoders/rules, monitored file integrity, and analyzed threat events.

rooms.title: Wireshark: Packet Analysis
rooms.description: Analyzed network streams, filtered raw PCAPs, and detected anomalies like ARP spoofing or port scans.

rooms.title: Zeek (formerly Bro)
rooms.description: Monitored live traffic logs, parsed network signatures, and used custom scripting for automatic alerts.

rooms.title: Snort NIDS Rule-Writing
rooms.description: Wrote Snort signatures to detect ICMP flooding, brute-force patterns, and bad payload footprints.

rooms.title: Autopsy Forensics Tool
rooms.description: Extracted raw disk images, recovered deleted artifacts, reviewed metadata, and generated forensic reports.

rooms.title: Volatility Memory Forensics
rooms.description: Analyzed RAM dumps to uncover injected DLLs, running processes, hidden network sockets, and malware.

rooms.title: Windows Forensics Hives
rooms.description: Analyzed registry, Prefetch, Shellbags, and security logs to construct event timelines during compromise.

rooms.title: Phishing Emails 101
rooms.description: Analyzed raw email headers, extracted malicious attachment hashes, and decoded spoofing attempts (SPF/DKIM).

rooms.title: YARA Rules for Detection
rooms.description: Wrote custom pattern matching rules to identify and classify malware based on strings and byte patterns.

rooms.title: Threat Intelligence: MISP
rooms.description: Shared Indicators of Compromise (IoCs) and structured threat feeds to enable proactive threat defense.
